ab: mwadringadringai so, ai langai so sa manema?
en: A: Hello, what do you want to buy?

ab: ai langai zako sa eea ka ti’aw.
en: B: I want to buy a cup.

ab: mwadringadringai so, ai langai so sa manema?
en: A: Hello, what are you looking for?

ab: ai lwangai zako sa eea ka talro’ono.
en: B: I want to buy a hat.

ab: ai langai zako ti’aw, walangalangai nomi?
ch: A:我要買杯子，你們有賣嗎?
en: A: I want to buy a cup, do you sell them?

ab: yakai, ai langai so ’iya?
en: B: Yes, how many do you want to buy?

ab: walangalangai nomi sa sabiki?
en: A: Do you sell betel nut?

ab: kadrowa, kai nai langalangai sa sabiki.
en: B: No, we don't sell betel nut.

ab: ai langai zako berathe.
en: A: I want to buy rice.

ab: ai langai so sa thino?
en: B: How many packs do you want to buy?

ab: bwazaili sa tolo ki lomase.
en: A: Give me three packs.

ab: ai langai zako borasi.
en: A: I want to buy sweet potatoes.

ab: malre’engenga kai borasi.
en: B: All the sweet potatoes are sold out.

ab: ai langai zako drosa ka dalilri ka abora.
en: A: I want to buy two bottles of oil.

ab: ‘asatedra sadalilringa.
en: B: We only have one bottle left.

ab: ‘osaka’eleai li mwa langai sa batoko.
en: A: Go buy me eggs.

ab: ai langai so ‘iya ka tingting?
en: B: How many pounds do you want to buy?

ab: ai langai so ‘iya ka tingting kai batoko?
en: A: How many pounds of eggs do you want to buy?

ab: ai langai zako drosa ka tingting.
en: B: I want to buy two catties.

ab: ai langai zako kai tangerava ka drosa ka sagemalre.
en: A: I want to buy two green onions.

ab: yakai ka tolo sagemalre, na bwainga mosowa.
en: B: There are three left, all for you!

ab: kai eea ki lomase ka borathe thaino ka ‘aiso?
en: A: How much is this bag of rice?

ab: eea ki lomase ka drosa ka iday
en: B: $200 for a pack.

ab: kai lre’eng ka ma’osale si eea, twa’adolowa ko mo’osale katha.
en: A:The total is $21, just count $20.

ab: maelanenga.
en: B: Thank you.

ab: kaivai ka mabangate si lima ka ’aiso.
en: A: Here's $95.

ab: naw langaiyana bekela, ni ‘ahwa akela ka iday ka ‘aiso
en: B: I'll buy some more, and make up 100 yuan.

ab: kai lre’eng ka lima ka iday si mangeale ka ‘aiso.
en: A:All $510.

ab: to lima ka iday nakowa, eene?
en: B: Count me in for $500, okay?

ab: makocinglre kaivai, twa’adolowa sa bekela?
ch: A:這個太貴了，可以算便宜一點嗎?
en: A: It's too expensive, can you make it cheaper?

ab: ini, kaivai ka ma’adolonga.
ch: B:不行，這個已經很便宜了。
en: B: No, this is already very cheap.

ab: ai malra ko kai sinbi kai pingkang
en: A: I want this packet of cookies.

ab: kaivai sinbi ka matolrolo, yakaiyana ka ai langai so sadroma?
ch: B:這餅乾30元，還需要別的東西嗎?
en: B: $30 for the cookies, anything else you need?
